name: Blackwing - Decay the Ill Wind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＢＦ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ブラックフェザー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>弔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とむらい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かぜ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のデス
name_jp_rom: Burakku Fezā - Tomurai Kaze no Desu
name_jp_tl: Black Feather - Death the Mourning Wind
desc:
Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card is in the Graveyard because it was sent there this turn: Take 1000 damage. When this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Blackwing" monster you control, then activate 1 of these effects;
● Increase its Level by 1.
● Reduce its Level by 1.
You can only use this effect of "Blackwing - Decay the Ill Wind" once per turn.
